summary: Minimum contract for moving validated governance traces into the external long-lived governance diary.
purpose: Export validated trace bundles, append normalized governance diary entries, and verify export receipts across the traces to obsidian-mcp boundary only.

forbidden_expansion: Unvalidated or ad hoc data export.
scope: Export validated trace bundles from traces/.

allowed_inputs: Receipt artifacts from the external governance diary.
forbidden_inputs: Ad hoc export requests without trace linkage.
non_goals: Direct runtime implementation inside governance core.
controls: Only validated governance artifacts may be exported.
Export payloads must remain trace-linked and hash-verifiable.
External diary writes require a receipt artifact before completion.

evidence_contract.hash_policy: Export packets and receipts must remain append-only and sha256-referenced.
evidence_contract.trace_linkage: Use an append-only hash-referenced packet and receipt flow for traces to obsidian-mcp export.

runtime_contract.invocation_surface: validated trace export to external governance diary

change_log.change: Collapsed governance journal MCP Markdown docs into a single JSON contract bundle and fixed the traces to obsidian-mcp boundary.
